requirement_topic.en: Connector Redesign — GB/T 20234 versus IEC 62196 Type 2 and CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口重新设计——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2及CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 介面重新設計——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2及CCS2

summary.en: Moldova deployments commonly follow the European IEC ecosystem for EV charging where IEC 62196 Type 2 is used for AC and CCS2 for DC fast charging when specified by operator, fleet, project, or regulation. For Moldova, IEC Type 2/CCS2 compatibility should be verified against site procurement and interconnection requirements, not treated as an automatic legal approval by itself.
summary.zh: 摩尔多瓦部署通常采用欧洲IEC生态，交流通常为IEC 62196 Type 2，直流快充多采用CCS2，具体取决于运营方、车队、项目或规则。摩尔多瓦中Type 2/CCS2兼容性应按站点采购和接入要求核实，而不能单独视为自动法律批准。
summary.zht: 摩爾多瓦部署通常採用歐洲IEC生態，交流通常為IEC 62196 Type 2，直流快充多採用CCS2，取決於營運方、車隊、專案或規則。摩爾多瓦中Type 2/CCS2相容性應按站點採購與接入要求核實，而不能單獨視為自動法律批准。

standards_or_laws: Project, fleet, operator, or public-procurement connector requirements

summary.en: China references typically use GB/T 20234.2 for AC and GB/T 20234.3 for DC connectors. These references are useful baselines but must be converted where Moldova projects specify Type 2 or CCS2, including locking logic, communication interfaces, and safety revalidation.
summary.zh: 中国资料通常采用GB/T 20234.2用于交流和GB/T 20234.3用于直流接口。该基础可作为参考，但在摩尔多瓦指定Type 2或CCS2时必须转换，包括锁定逻辑、通信接口和安全复评。
summary.zht: 中國資料通常採用GB/T 20234.2用於交流和GB/T 20234.3用於直流介面。該基礎可作為參考，但在摩爾多瓦指定Type 2或CCS2時必須轉換，包括鎖定邏輯、通訊介面和安全複審。

gap.en: Design and procurement actions for Moldova-bound chargers usually include connector conversion, pilot and proximity logic verification, cable thermal approvals, lock and safety interlock checks, station label updates, and post-redesign commissioning evidence.
gap.zh: 面向摩尔多瓦的充电桩通常需进行接口转换、导引/接近控制逻辑验证、电缆热容量核验、锁定与安全联锁检查、站牌更新以及接口重设计后的复测。
gap.zht: 面向摩爾多瓦之充電樁通常需進行接口轉換、導引/靠近控制邏輯驗證、電纜熱容量核驗、鎖定與安全聯鎖檢查、站牌更新以及介面重設計後的複測。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where project procurement, operator, or fleet specifies Type 2 / CCS2; otherwise interoperability expectation only
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — GB/T 20234 is China baseline only and does not confirm Type 2 or CCS2 compatibility for Moldova

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not present GB/T 20234 hardware as Type 2 / CCS2 ready for Moldova projects. Build connector and communication evidence around the declared Moldova project interface specification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将GB/T 20234硬件直接说明为摩尔多瓦项目的Type 2/CCS2就绪。应围绕项目指定接口建立对应的硬件和通信证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將GB/T 20234硬件直接宣稱為摩爾多瓦專案的Type 2/CCS2就緒。應圍繞專案指定介面建立對應硬體與通信證據。
